What We Do

Everything your team needs to look the part

Custom Uniforms

Tailored workwear that reflects your brand identity. From fabric selection to final stitch — every detail crafted for a sharp, consistent look.

EmbroideryScreen PrintCustom Fit

Branded Items

Mugs, notebooks, badges, bags, and more — all branded with your logo. Reinforce your identity at every touchpoint, inside and outside your business.

Mugs & CupsNotebooksBadges & Lanyards

Design Services

No design? No problem. Our team creates professional layouts, mockups, and brand presentation assets — so everything looks intentional and premium.

MockupsBrand GuidelinesArtwork

Who We Serve

Built for businesses that care about their image

🍽️

Restaurants

Chef coats, server uniforms, host attire

☕

Cafes

Branded aprons, caps, and barista wear

🏢

Businesses

Office wear, reception, sales teams

👔

Corporate Teams

Executive uniforms & branded merch kits

🎓

Schools

Student uniforms, faculty wear, PE kits

🎪

Events

Staff vests, crew shirts, event branding

Why CladCo

More than a supplier.
A partner in
presentation.

We don't just manufacture. We help you think about how your team represents your brand — and then we execute it flawlessly.

100%

Custom production — no off-the-shelf shortcuts

01

Professional Look, Every Time

Consistency builds trust. We ensure your team looks polished and aligned — whether it's one person or one hundred.

02

Fully Custom Solutions

Every business is different. We work with your brand colors, logo, and style to produce something uniquely yours.

03

Flexible Quality Tiers

From budget-friendly starter packs to premium production runs — we offer options that match your scale and ambition.

04

Reliable, End-to-End

Design, produce, deliver. We own the full process so you never have to coordinate between multiple vendors.

How It Works

Simple process. Professional results.

01

Tell Us What You Need

Send us a message on WhatsApp. Share your requirements, team size, and any ideas you have.

02

We Design & Confirm

Our team prepares mockups and samples. You review, provide feedback, and approve before anything goes to production.

03

We Produce

Once approved, production begins with quality materials and careful attention to your brand details.

04

We Deliver

Your order arrives on time, packaged properly, ready for your team to wear with pride.

Start the Process

One message is all it takes. Tell us about your team and we'll handle everything — from design to delivery.
